summary: Full backend (pytest 30/30 passing, 100%) + frontend UI smoke + integration testing on IBNE RIHAT UNIVERSE. Auth (email login/register/logout/protected routes), dashboard with live metrics, Money Center CRUD + charts, Clients CRUD + search/edit/delete, and all 12 module pages reachable with add-btn rendered. Focus presets + toggle present. Backend covers auth, all 14 representative resources CRUD, search/sort filters, dashboard/analytics aggregations, weather, activity_logs, and authorization guards.

minor.issue: Not tested end-to-end (requires real Emergent OAuth session). Code path returns 400 without X-Session-ID and forwards to Emergent endpoint; logic looks correct.
Uses pydantic EmailStr which rejects some TLDs (e.g. .test). Not a bug, but tests must use a real TLD like .com.

ui_bugs.issue: Display Name and Bio inputs do not expose data-testid='field-name' / 'field-bio' (CrudModal pattern not used). Update-profile API works via PUT /api/auth/profile, but the spec listed these test-ids.
No [data-testid='confirm-delete'] modal observed after clicking delete-item; deletion likely uses window.confirm. Spec mentioned confirm-delete testid which is missing.

After fresh register, dashboard main content area renders blank (sidebar only) — likely because all metrics are 0 / empty arrays and there is no empty-state placeholder. The owner account shows full content fine. No JS errors thrown.

issues: Recharts logs `width(-1) height(-1)` warning during initial mount (responsive container measuring); chart renders correctly afterward. Add minHeight to ResponsiveContainer parent.
Radix DialogContent missing `aria-describedby` / `Description` — accessibility warning in console. Non-blocking.

action_items: Add data-testid='field-name' and data-testid='field-bio' on Settings inputs to match spec.
Add data-testid='confirm-delete' inside a real confirmation modal (currently uses native confirm) for clients/goals/etc.
Add an empty-state UI for the Dashboard when a fresh user has no income/clients/goals/etc. (currently the main area is essentially blank for new users).
Wrap recharts ResponsiveContainer with explicit minHeight to silence width(-1)/height(-1) warning.
Add `aria-describedby` (or DialogDescription) to Radix DialogContent in CrudModal.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 669 lines — still single-file, acceptable but approaches the 700-line threshold; consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/crud.py, routers/aggregations.py.

make_crud() trusts arbitrary client payloads (`payload: dict`). No per-resource validation. Acceptable for an internal personal OS but means clients can store any field. Add lightweight pydantic schemas per resource.

Brute-force lockout in /auth/login resets `locked_until` on every failed attempt, which effectively extends the lock indefinitely on each new attempt (always 15 min from latest fail). Acceptable behavior but worth documenting.
set_session_cookie uses `secure=True, samesite='none'` — correct for cross-site preview, but won't work over plain http (fine for prod-style preview only).
Cookie path is `/`, but on logout, response.delete_cookie does not include secure/samesite which can cause some browsers to ignore the deletion. Bearer fallback works regardless.
Dashboard aggregation iterates collections in Python with sum_field() — fine for personal OS scale, but should use Mongo $sum aggregation for large datasets.
Frontend: Dashboard.jsx empty-state missing — new users see a blank canvas (medium-priority UX issue).

success_rate.frontend: ~90% — all spec flows verified for owner; minor gaps in testid coverage on Settings/delete-confirm and empty-state for new users

test_credentials: ibne@rihat.universe / Dominate2026 — verified working. Also created throwaway register accounts during testing (uitest_*@example.com).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed records under the owner account and delete them within the same test (CRUD flow). One persistent client/income/goal may remain if the UI script was interrupted, but the cleanup pattern is in place.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is comprehensive and reusable at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run with: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Auth uses Bearer token returned in login/register body (cookies require secure+SameSite=None). Use `@example.com` (not `.test`) when registering — pydantic EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs. UI add-btn appears on every module page. Focus has presets 25/50/90 + focus-toggle. Settings page lacks field-name/field-bio testids but the PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint works (verified).
